active_ingredients: ACTIVE INGREDIENT (in each 1.25 mL) Ibuprofen 50 mg (NSAID)* *nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug
indications_and_usage: USE(S) temporarily: reduces fever relieves minor aches and pains due to the common cold, flu, sore throat, headaches and toothaches
dosage_and_administration: DIRECTIONS this product does not contain directions or complete warnings for adult use do not give more than directed shake well before using find right dose on chart below. If possible, use weight to dose; otherwise use age. mL=milliliter measure with dosing device provided. Do not use any other dosing device. dispense liquid slowly into the child's mouth, toward the inner cheek if needed, repeat dose every 6-8 hours do not use more than 4 times a day Dosing Chart WEIGHT (lb) AGE (mos) DOSE (mL) under 6 mos ask a doctor 12-17 lbs 6-11 mos 1.25 mL 18-23 lbs 12-23 years 1.875 mL
